description: Create documentation and installation setup: Write README.md with project description, installation instructions (go install), usage examples, keyboard shortcuts. Add example config.yaml. Create Makefile with targets: build, install, test, clean. Add .gitignore for Go projects (bin/, .tasks/, etc). Document all TUI keyboard shortcuts and CLI commands.
note: Created all documentation files: README.md, Makefile, example-config.yaml. All files tested and working.
acceptance_criteria: README.md exists with: project description, features list, installation via go install
README documents all CLI commands: wt, wt config add/list/init
README documents TUI keyboard shortcuts: arrows, Enter, o, c, d, q
Makefile exists with targets: build, install, test, clean
example-config.yaml shows sample with 2-3 example projects

verification.value: Read README and execute documented commands to verify accuracy
